title: Sila Nodigalil
overview: What happens when your fate is messed up and you are trapped in your past?  When a married cosmetic surgeon Raj Varadhan from London falls in love with his model girlfriend Maya Pillai who accidentally dies due to drug overdose, his life takes him on an unexpected ride! Will he be able to hide his secrets from his wife Medha?
